name_cn:
Genuine leather
Gold chain sold separately
Mini calfskin Pebble Bucket Tote
Pebble 👜 cleverly blends pure minimalist lines with eye-catching design 💄 creating a unique and innovative bag design. The iconic Anagram engraved hardware serves both decoration and function 👄 adjustable strap length and fits various carrying ways, and the unique twisted structure complements subtle details. 👛 This mini version is made of soft grained calfskin. 😻 Crossbody, shoulder, or handheld *Adjustable removable strap *Magnetic closure *Interior pocket *Synthetic leather lining * 🔥 Anagram engraved pebble 💥
Style: 332s
Size: Height 20CM~Opening 16CM~13
